message:
feat(runtime): implement CLUSTER, ASKING, READONLY, and READWRITE command handlers

Add Redis cluster client-mode state management to fr-runtime:

- New ClusterClientState struct tracking ReadWrite/ReadOnly mode and ASKING flag
- ASKING command: sets one-shot asking flag for next command dispatch
- READONLY command: switches client to read-only replica mode
- READWRITE command: resets client to default read-write mode, clears asking
- CLUSTER command router: dispatches subcommands with CLUSTER HELP support,
  returns standard CLUSTER_UNKNOWN_SUBCOMMAND_ERROR for unrecognized subs
- Two new deterministic property tests validating subcommand routing and
  client mode flag transitions

This enables cluster-aware client simulation for conformance testing
against multi-node Redis topologies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
